initial_candidates.sql:
SELECT T.team_long_name
FROM Match M
JOIN League L ON M.league_id = L.id
JOIN Team T ON M.away_team_api_id = T.team_api_id
WHERE L.name = 'Scotland Premier League'
  AND M.season = '2010'
  AND M.away_team_goal > M.home_team_goal
GROUP BY M.away_team_api_id
ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT Team.team_long_name
FROM Match
JOIN League ON Match.league_id = League.id
JOIN Team ON Match.away_team_api_id = Team.team_api_id
WHERE League.name = 'Scotland Premier League'
  AND Match.season = '2010'
  AND Match.away_team_goal > Match.home_team_goal
GROUP BY Match.away_team_api_id
ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC
LIMIT 1;
